## Meeting Purpose

[Bi-weekly knowledge share between AirOps and GXL, focusing on new features, training feedback, and addressing challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AirOps introduced Co-pilot, a powerful AI assistant for workflow comprehension and troubleshooting](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [New home and workspace organization launched, featuring improved navigation and folder structure](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [GXL's training approach combines AirOps Academy, webinars, and hands-on practice with simple workflows](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Permissions and sharing improvements are on AirOps' roadmap, with GXL emphasizing need for granular access control](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)

## Topics

### Co-pilot Feature Demo

  - [AI-powered assistant for building and navigating workflows](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Provides context-aware explanations of workflow functions](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Assists in troubleshooting by identifying and fixing errors in code steps](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Future capabilities to include generating new workflow steps based on user descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

### New Home and Workspace Organization

  - [Improved navigation with tabs for grids and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Enhanced information display: icons, version info, total runs, last edited details](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Introduced folder structure for better organization, replacing tags](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Toggle option available to switch between new and old interfaces](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)

### Training and Education Feedback

  - [GXL's approach:](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
      - [Utilizes AirOps Academy and webinars](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
      - [Assigns new team members to build simple workflows](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
      - [Places newcomers in supporting account manager roles](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Team found AirOps training "quite good" and appreciated weekly check-ins](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [AirOps to include demo videos for each product update in the future](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)

### Challenges and Improvements

  - [Occasional error messages in workflow execution (frequency and cause unclear)](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [Co-pilot suggested as a tool for understanding and resolving errors](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [GXL team generally finds AirOps intuitive and reliable](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)

### Feature Requests: Permissions and Sharing

  - [GXL needs more granular access control:](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
      - [Full access for full-time employees](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
      - [Limited access for freelancers (e.g., view/edit grids only, no workflow access)](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
  - [AirOps acknowledges the request, noting it's on their roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [Collaboration features (like content approval process) being considered](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GXL team to test Co-pilot feature and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [GXL to utilize the GrowthEx AirOps support channel for recurring errors](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
  - [AirOps to continue development on permissions and sharing features](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [GXL to prepare for upcoming complex client outputs and anticipate related questions](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [AirOps to release next product update with demo videos next week](https://fathom.video/share/BYJhd6cf8R1zBuJvJojfurT8nZyFC-Mp?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
